formulas.name: GDP per capita
formulas.formula: GDP per capita = Total GDP / Total Population

variables.Total GDP: Total Gross Domestic Product of the country

formulas.name: Human Development Index (HDI)
formulas.formula: HDI = (Life Expectancy Index + Education Index + Income Index) / 3

variables.Education Index: Average years of schooling and expected years of schooling

formulas.name: Gross Domestic Product (GDP) Growth Rate
formulas.formula: GDP Growth Rate = (Current Year's GDP - Previous Year's GDP) / Previous Year's GDP

variables.Current Year's GDP: Gross Domestic Product of the current year
variables.Previous Year's GDP: Gross Domestic Product of the previous year

formulas.name: Road Density
formulas.formula: Road Density = Total Road Length / Total Land Area

variables.Total Road Length: Total length of roads in the country
variables.Total Land Area: Total land area of the country

formulas.name: Railway Density
formulas.formula: Railway Density = Total Railway Route Length / Total Land Area

variables.Total Railway Route Length: Total length of railway routes in the country
variables.Total Land Area: Total land area of the country

variables.Total Telephones: Total number of telephones in the country

formulas.name: Internet Penetration Rate
formulas.formula: Internet Penetration Rate = Total Internet Users / Total Population

variables.Total Internet Users: Total number of internet users in the country
